diagnosis.explanation: All 38 invalid outputs are '<tool_call>' loops — the Qwen3 chat template exposes a <tool_call> token that greedy decoding occasionally repeats instead of emitting JSON. This is a DECODING artifact, not a learned-capability failure; separable from model quality.
diagnosis.fix: suppress the <tool_call> token id at generation (suppress_tokens), then re-run the 38. Needs a GPU.
